tests.name: external integrations are not implied live

tests.name: upgrade requires evidence packet update
tests.expected: Any upgrade to LIVE requires integration owner approval, endpoint/config/artifact evidence, truth badge, evidence packet update, claim ledger update, and Q&A update.

tests.name: SPEC_ONLY branch does not implement integrations
tests.expected: Runtime, UI, package files, and CI remain untouched by this branch.
